name: web-competitive-research-with-fallback

related_skills.name: browser-extract-with-fallback-tiers
related_skills.why: Reliable per-page extraction (screenshot -> page text -> search) is the gathering primitive this research workflow orchestrates across sites.

related_skills.name: cite-sources-in-research-output
related_skills.why: Every figure in the comparison must carry a source URL; a citation skill enforces that discipline.

citations: friction: chrome extension screenshots could not be persisted to the sandbox filesystem — a core deliverable
friction: heavy vn real-estate sites loaded slowly / rendered prices as image/canvas, blocking clean screenshots
friction: upload_image / save_to_disk attempts did not produce files in the target folder
pattern: Fell back to WebSearch + HTML page-text extraction when live screenshots stalled
pattern: Batched browser actions to reduce round-trips
pattern: Transparently disclosed that screenshots could not be saved rather than hiding the gap
pattern: Delivered a substantive comparison with cited sources
pattern: Broke the task into a tracked task list before starting

eval_provenance.note: Cluster too thin to spare a held-out episode; evals fall back to the LLM's in-distribution cases (NOT a generalisation test).
